blocks.text: The engagement team met with representatives of {{fact:f:E-2003-001.client}} to review progress on the plant consolidation study. These minutes were prepared by Andrea Diaz and are circulated to all attendees for correction before they are placed in the engagement file.

items: Kimberly Price, Senior Consultant, Cindergrove Advisors Inc
Andrea Diaz, Consultant, Cindergrove Advisors Inc

blocks.text: Kimberly Price reviewed the field observations completed to date at the first plant, covering production scheduling and inventory handling. She noted that the observations support the working view that scheduling practices differ materially between the two locations, and she cautioned against drawing conclusions until the second plant has been walked in the same manner.

Heather King asked how the analysis would treat freight costs. Andrea Diaz reported that the freight cost detail has not yet been received from Wagner-Greene; rather than estimate, the team has recorded this as an open item below. Ms. King agreed to have the detail pulled by her accounting staff and sent to the engagement team.

rows: Provide freight cost detail to the engagement team
Complete floor observations at the second plant
Prepare preliminary consolidation findings for internal review
